---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Create a new ticket for a new feature request.
title: "✨ [REQUEST] - "
labels: question
assignees: ""
---

# Feature Request

## Summary

[Provide a brief explanation of the feature. Describe in a few
lines your feature request and the problem it solves.]

## Basic Example

[Indicate here some basic examples of your feature. Provide a
brief explanation of how it would work or look in practice.]

## Drawbacks

[What are the drawbacks/impacts of your feature request?
Identify any potential downsides, performance impacts, or
complexities while remaining objective.]

## Unresolved Questions

[What questions still remain unresolved? Identify any pending
issues, unknown factors, or design decisions that still need
to be made.]

## Start Date

[If applicable, include a start date following MM/DD/YYYY format.]

## Implementation PR

[If applicable, include the PR ID if this feature has been implemented.]

## Reference Issues

[If applicable, include any issues that directly reference this feature request.]
